title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo (v0.1.0) is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework in TypeScript (Node.js 22). Core layers: input router → command dispatcher / agent runtime → LLM provider adapters (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek) → tool calls (exec/glob/grep/read) → SQLite persistence. Key modules: agent (Pepe semantic memory, task runner), commands (slash commands), desktop (Electron three-tier), memory (embedding-based retrieval), providers, sessions, tools. Entry points: `cli/index.ts` (terminal) and `desktop/main/main.ts` (Electron). Config & data stored in `.pueblo/`.
